name: Balsamic Ratatouille
recipeIngredient: 1 Sprig fresh thyme chopped into 1/4 inch pieces
1/4 teaspoon Kosher salt; or to taste
1/8 teaspoon Black pepper; or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour olive oil into a heated sauté pan. Add garlic and cook over medium heat, stirring, for 30 seconds.
2. Add all diced vegetables and cook, stirring, until tender but crisp, about 2 to 3 minutes.
3. Add thyme and balsamic vinegar. Stir just until blended.
4. Remove from heat. Season with salt and pepper.
Serve with Grilled Balsamic Veal Chops and Mashed Potatoes with Mascarpone Cheese & Roasted Garlic.
